narrative:
Cardington Village E (precinct in Morrow County) has 670 registered voters, with 58.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.4 percentage points.
